Bash(sqlite3 backend/mis_reports.db "SELECT p.row_label, p.param_name, a.actual, a.till_month_actual FROM techno_actuals a JOIN techno_param p ON a.param_id = p.param_id WHERE p.row_label = 'SAIL' AND a.report_month = '2026-03' AND p.param_name IN \('Hot Metal Consumption', 'Scrap Consumption'\)")

Bash(sqlite3 backend/mis_reports.db "SELECT DISTINCT p.row_label FROM techno_param p JOIN techno_actuals a ON a.param_id = p.param_id WHERE a.report_month = '2026-03' AND p.param_name IN \('Hot Metal Consumption', 'Scrap Consumption'\) ORDER BY p.row_label")
